body:
Bead is a test fixture: title "test child", description "test", acceptance "test".

No actionable work is specified — there is no concrete file, behavior, or artifact named in the description or AC. The acceptance criterion "test" is not a verifiable condition tied to any code or document in the repository.

Done: nothing to do.
Blocking: bead has no real contract; it appears to be a synthetic child bead created to exercise the execute-bead harness itself (see parent ddx-5d49b14e).
Follow-up: close the parent/child as test artifacts, or replace the description/AC with a real contract if implementation is actually wanted.
